task_completion.description: Navigate to the patients list or search interface in HospitalRun.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the HospitalRun application with the 'Patients' section open and a list of patients or a patient search bar visible.

task_completion.description: Locate the target patient 'Marcus Wellington' (P00300) and initiate the deletion process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent clicking a 'Delete' button, trash can icon, or selecting a delete option from a dropdown menu specifically for the patient record of 'Marcus Wellington' or ID 'P00300'.

task_completion.description: Confirm the permanent deletion of the target patient's record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a confirmation dialog or modal warning about deleting the patient record, with the agent clicking 'OK', 'Yes', or 'Confirm' to finalize the deletion.

task_completion.description: Verify that the target patient 'Marcus Wellington' has been successfully deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the patient list or a search result for 'Marcus Wellington' or 'P00300' showing no matching records, confirming the deletion was successful.

task_completion.description: Verify that the control patient 'Elena Vasquez' was not deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the patient list showing that 'Elena Vasquez' (P00100) is still present and intact, ensuring no collateral deletions occurred.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to delete the record, not terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or command-line interfaces (like curl or direct database queries) should be used to perform the deletion.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual HospitalRun web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser should display the genuine HospitalRun interface, not a text editor, mock UI, or script file containing the expected answers.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the deletion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's 'Inspect Element' or Developer Tools pane should not be open and used to simply hide the HTML element of the target patient.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Patient to be deleted: 'Marcus Wellington' (Friendly ID: P00300). Control Patient that MUST remain intact: 'Elena Vasquez' (Friendly ID: P00100). The agent must permanently delete Marcus Wellington's record via the HospitalRun UI and ensure Elena Vasquez's record is untouched.
